name: @ptdl/plugin-custom-header
description: Style titles and labels on both clients (classic / and modern /v/): page header, table column headers, form & detail field labels, and block/section titles — prefix icon (Lucide via @ptdl/plugin-custom-icons registry), text color, size, bold, background, and column alignment. Field-level defaults ('set once, show in every view') persist server-side. Client-only; bundles no icon library.
